occurrence_sentence: The milestone was achieved on the IonQ Forte through hardware and software improvements.

"Achieving our 2024 technical performance milestone a year early furthers IonQ's technical leadership in developing the world's most powerful and accurate commercially available quantum systems," said Peter Chapman, CEO & President of IonQ.

This important milestone was achieved on IonQ Forte and leveraged the unique advantages of IonQ's quantum computers, including high-fidelity trapped ion qubits and the industry's only all-to-all connected architecture.

interaction_phrase: The milestone was achieved on the IonQ Forte
occurrence_sentence: The milestone was achieved on the IonQ Forte through hardware and software improvements.

occurrence_sentence: The single-number AQ metric is derived from algorithmic benchmarking protocols established in an independent industry-wide study conducted by the Quantum Economic Development Consortium (QED-C).

"Achieving our 2024 technical performance milestone a year early furthers IonQ's technical leadership in developing the world's most powerful and accurate commercially available quantum systems," said Peter Chapman, CEO & President of IonQ.

occurrence_sentence: The single-number AQ metric is derived from algorithmic benchmarking protocols established in [an independent industry-wide study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2110.03137) conducted by the Quantum Economic Development Consortium (QED-C).
